heading: Appointments and promotions to permanent grades
label: 3026 Appointments and promotions to permanent grades

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Appointments in and promotions to all permanent grades, other than a grade described in subsection (b), shall be made by the President.

children.heading: Flag Officers
children.label: b Flag Officers
children.text: Appointments in and promotions to the grade of rear admiral (upper half) or above shall be made by the President, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate.
